issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.action: Keep breaker-first truth on hb_predict_probe.py, /lab, /execution/status, and current-state docs until recent 50 reaches at least 15 wins and streak falls below 50.

issues.title: q15 exact support remains 0/50 and stalled, but support-aware governance is now visible under breaker
issues.action: Keep `support_route_verdict`, `support_progress`, `minimum_support_rows`, and `gap_to_minimum` visible in probe/API/UI even when circuit_breaker_active is the primary blocker, and do not regress to stale support narratives.

issues.title: broader bull|CAUTION spillover remains toxic while the exact live lane has zero rows
issues.action: Turn the broader bull|CAUTION toxic pocket into a reproducible gate/calibration/training patch, then verify it with drilldown artifacts, hb_predict_probe.py, targeted pytest, and browser validation on /lab.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified

summary.main_blocker: live exchange credential 尚未驗證 · order ack lifecycle 尚未驗證 · fill lifecycle 尚未驗證

issues.action: Keep venue blockers explicitly visible on operator surfaces until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: 連續 200 筆 1440m simulated_pyramid_win=0
issues.action: 檢查 recent canonical labels / regime breakdown / circuit breaker；必要時升級為 distribution-aware drift 調查

issues.title: recent canonical window 100 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=100, alerts=['constant_target', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0000, delta_vs_full=-0.6316, dominant_regime=bull(100.00%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0095, avg_quality=-0.2865, avg_dd_penalty=0.3873, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:28/56, frozen:1, compressed:27, expected_static:1, overlay_only:4, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:11, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-17 19:48:03.281485 -> 2026-04-17 22:29:49.821627, adverse_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-17 19:48:03.281485 -> 2026-04-17 22:29:49.821627, prev_win_rate=0.0, delta_vs_prev=0.0, prev_quality=-0.2831, quality_delta_vs_prev=-0.0034, prev_pnl=-0.0105, pnl_delta_vs_prev=0.001, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_vol_ratio(1.563→0.239,Δσ=2.3681)/feat_mind(0.0362→0.0003,Δσ=0.7283)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.1223→0.909,Δσ=0.6628), frozen_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(0.0/1), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/100)/feat_claw_intensity(0.0027/19)/feat_scales_ssr(0.0027/54), expected_static_examples=feat_4h_ma_order[discrete_regime_feature], overlay_only_examples=feat_claw[research_sparse_source]/feat_claw_intensity[research_sparse_source]/feat_fang_pcr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(1/3)/feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0/0)/feat_chorus(0/0), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-17 21:27:31.748471:0:bull:-0.2817/2026-04-17 21:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.289/2026-04-17 22:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2981, adverse_examples=2026-04-17 21:27:31.748471:0:bull:-0.2817/2026-04-17 21:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.289/2026-04-17 22:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2981

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_label+entry_quality_label, regime=bull/BLOCK, label=D, sample_size=199, window=100, alerts=['constant_target'], expected_win_rate=0.0, expected_pnl=-0.01, expected_quality=-0.2865, layers=0→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(3.8991→3.0703)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.1241→0.909)/feat_4h_dist_swing_low(5.41→5.2494), exact_live_lane=(rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None), scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows'];
